allow: Bash(DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build -f infrastructure/docker/Dockerfile.service --build-arg SERVICE_NAME=auth-service --build-arg SERVICE_PORT=3002 -t comic-auth-service:test .)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Id -in @\(16152, 13188\) } | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, Path -AutoSize)

PowerShell($dd = Get-Process "Docker Desktop" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $svc = Get-Process "com.docker.backend" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $vmm = Get-Process "com.docker.virtualization" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "DD=$\($dd.Count\) SVC=$\($svc.Count\) VMM=$\($vmm.Count\)")
